modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty setting up a VoIP conference phone in USD rooms.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing challenges while trying to set up a VoIP conference phone in the USD conference rooms. They are unsure of the steps needed to complete the setup. This issue is impacting their ability to hold effective meetings.

description: The user is experiencing challenges while trying to set up a VoIP conference phone in the USD conference rooms. They are unsure of the steps needed to complete the setup. This issue is impacting their ability to hold effective meetings.
